creator: mrspock@esfm.ipn.mx
text:
On Sun, 3 May 1998, Satoshi Asami wrote:

>  * Image Magick 4.0.2 is not working properly.
>  * It seems to need a library:  "libttf"
> 
>  * Install FreeBSD 2.2.6
>  * Install ImageMagick.4.0.2.tgz using pkg_add
> 
> As far as I can tell, libttf is listed as a dependency of ImageMagick
> for 2.2.6R.  It should have installed the freetype-1.0 package, unless 
> pkg_add was misbehaving.
> 
> Try pkg_add'ing freetype-1.0.tgz and see if it works.
> 
> Satoshi
> 

Thank you.

ImageMagick reported there was a package (freetype) that could not load.
FreeType is in the forth CD, so it must be loaded before loading
ImageMagick.

Sorry, I never have had this problem before, usually FreeBSD's CD sets
contain all the packages along with its requirements in the same CD.

It worked fine.  Thank you.
